platform: Demandware (Salesforce Commerce Cloud) with Algolia Search

catalog_url.notes: Page loads but geo-redirected to Spanish (es-ES) locale. No product data in rendered HTML. Has instantSearchResults div but empty.

list_page_url.notes: Browser render returns 618KB but geo-redirected to Spain. No product tiles visible. 22 product count mentions but no actual products.

detail_url_pattern.notes: From Round 1: Demandware endpoints include Product-ShowQuickView, Algolia-SearchResultsSlot. Multiple locale variants.

pagination.notes: Has aa-search-input and instantSearchResults divs. Algolia-powered search.

api_response_sample.notes: Demandware platform with Algolia search integration. No API data extracted due to geo-redirect.

reasons: No product data in rendered HTML
Algolia search integration but no public API access
limitations: Demandware + Algolia requires specific access patterns
clm_suitability.recommended_approach: Not suitable without locale override or proxy to target region.

next_steps: Try with locale-specific cookies or headers
Try Algolia API with correct credentials
